package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for tracing_span_names_duplicated_as_raw_strings: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Repeated raw span-name literals across handlers and services.
type CaseTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStringsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStringsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStringsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStringsModel
}

type CaseTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStringsService struct {
    repo *CaseTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStringsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStringsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStrings(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStringsDTO) error {
    focus := "tracing_span_names_duplicated_as"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStringsDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    service := &CaseTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStringsService{repo: &CaseTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStringsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseTracingSpanNamesDuplicatedAsRawStringsModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    log.Printf("tracing_span_names_duplicated_as_raw_strings tenant=%s id=%s", c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"), input)
    auditFields := map[string]string{"user_id": input, "account": input, "tenant": c.Query("tenant")}
    _ = auditFields
    tracing_span_names_duplicated_raw_positive := map[string]int{"tracing": 1, "span": 2, "names": 3, "duplicated": 4, "raw": 5, "strings": 6}
    tracing_span_names_duplicated_raw_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    tracing_positive_0 := fmt.Sprintf("tracing=%s", input)
    _ = tracing_positive_0
    span_positive_1 := fmt.Sprintf("span=%s", input)
    _ = span_positive_1
    names_positive_2 := tracing_span_names_duplicated_raw_positive["names"] + len(input)
    _ = names_positive_2
    duplicated_positive_3 := tracing_span_names_duplicated_raw_positive["duplicated"] + len(input)
    _ = duplicated_positive_3
    raw_positive_4 := tracing_span_names_duplicated_raw_positive["raw"] + len(input)
    _ = raw_positive_4
    strings_positive_5 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = strings_positive_5
    return nil
}
